title: KMwares 3PCs Set (34oz, 17oz, 4oz) Vintage Botany Apothecary Jars, Scientific Lab Reagent Decorative Bottles/Vase, Seasoning Organizer, Candy or Bathroom Containers (Color Clear)
description:
About this item
Multi-purpose bottle, Includes 3 PCS
Bottles are made from high quality glass
Bottles are perfect fit for office, living room, bedroom, kitchen, bar decor
Perfect using for food storage, vase, wish bottle
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
I bought these to decant my vitamins into because I hate the little packets they come in. I enjoy the vintage vibe and my pills are much easier to get every morning and night. (No kids in the house)These apothecary jars are exactly what I was looking for. The three jars have ground, friction-fit tops with no rubber or plastic gasket. The jars are slightly thinner than the antique ones that I already have but are robust enough for casual use in the kitchen (I use them as spice jars). The glass is clear and unmarked. The (metric) volume of the jars is in raised markings on the top of the stoppers but is not obtrusive so they blend well with the unmarked antique jars next to them.

The packaging is excellent with each piece and each top securely held in rigid, form-fitting foam. I was worried they would be broken in shipping like other products I have ordered, but all arrived intact. I'm ordering two more sets as I write this review.These bottles are beautiful, versatile, and look, just like the advertisement for them on Amazon. I gave them to my 25 year old daughter who uses them to display various colors of Seaglass. She enjoyed this as a Christmas gift so much. I gave her two more stats for her birthday. They’re beautiful. I highly recommend these, especially for the price!Great quality and perfect size. I needed these for shells I picked up and they fit perfect. Great display.Happy with these jars. Using for decor in the bathroom and just glued a little jewel on the top so it doesn't look scientific.Have already and get some more .love the fact that it's All glassThey have real ground glass seals and good selection of sizesLove it match my collection.I love the sze of these jars. Perfect for any need. I use mine for q-tips, bath salts and one is used to display sand from a beach in Mexico. Gorgeous, high quality jars that I will be buying againAs pictured. Nice quality.
reviews_1s: You would have to be out of your mind to use these for anything other than dry food, or inert objects like buttons etc. They are NOT lab quality for solvents. I wouldn't even put water in them. they are cast glass, with pieced bottoms that are prone to separation. Waste of my money. 25 dollars, more like 3 dollars. Absolutely worthless.
